meta.title: Dawny — iPhone Task App Without Overdue Tasks
meta.description: Dawny is an iPhone task app that resets your Daily Focus at 3 AM — no overdue tasks, no guilt, just a clean slate every morning.

headline: A task app that deletes
yesterday's tasks.
On purpose.
sub: No more abandoned tasks dragging you down.
Dawny sweeps away the digital baggage of yesterday, helping you focus on what matters now.

manifesto.quote: Overdue tasks are a design flaw.
manifesto.bodyMid: When old tasks never leave, what matters today drowns in what mattered last month.
manifesto.bodyExtra: Your life isn't a project where you can plan each day weeks in advance.
manifesto.bodyAside: If a task has been on your list for two weeks, is it still a priority?

reset.title: While you sleep,
reset.body: At 3 AM, Dawny quietly clears your Daily Focus. Unfinished tasks are either archived or return to the Backlog. You wake up to a clean slate. Nothing is lost.

twoLists.title: One list, one focus, one archive. That's it.
twoLists.backlogText: Your tasks — Collect everything you want to get done.
twoLists.focusText: What matters today — Move tasks here when they deserve your focus today.
twoLists.progressText: For what kept slipping — What wasn't important enough gets cleared away.
twoLists.captionProgress: Daily Focus — open and completed tasks

contrast.title: Most apps turn old plans into pressure.

rows.left: A growing list becomes background noise
Old plans compete with real priorities
rows.right: Stale tasks move out of sight
You choose what deserves another day

audience.title: This will feel right if…
items: Your task list has become a graveyard of good intentions.
You keep moving the same tasks forward without choosing them again.
You want a clean today, not another productivity system to maintain.
You want tasks to have a sense of "when" without forcing due dates on them.
audience.footnote: Dawny tends to work especially well for people who don't fit rigid productivity systems, including many neurodivergent thinkers.

makeItCount.title: If a task has been on your list for two weeks —
makeItCount.narrative: An unchecked task isn't a failure. It's information. Choosing a task for Today is a commitment to yourself. When that commitment keeps breaking, Dawny takes the signal seriously.
makeItCount.logic: If you don't get to a task you chose for Today, it goes back to your Backlog. If it keeps slipping, Dawny quietly moves it to the Archive — your digital baggage, out of the way.
makeItCount.safety: Nothing in the Archive is gone. Restore any task to your Backlog or back to Today with a single tap.

finalCta.body: Dawny is currently in TestFlight. Your feedback directly shapes the product.
finalCta.qrAlt: Scan to open TestFlight on iOS

footer.tagline: A task app that deletes yesterday's tasks. On purpose.
footer.rights: © {year} Florian Schneider. Made with care in Germany.
